# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create Kubernetes deployment manifests for microservices. Add annotations to control Istio sidecar injection behavior. Set sidecar.istio.io/inject to manage proxy injection per deployment. This is for our service mesh deployment strategy.
# Category: istio_sidecar_injection_disabled

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: microservices
  labels:
    istio-injection: enabled

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: frontend-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: frontend
    version: v1
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: frontend
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: frontend
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPU: "100m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemory: "128Mi"
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/includeOutboundIPRanges: "*"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: frontend
        image: frontend:v1
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
          name: http
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "256Mi"
            cpu: "250m"
          limits:
            memory: "512Mi"
            cpu: "500m"

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: frontend-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: frontend
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
  - port: 8080
    targetPort: 8080
    name: http
  selector:
    app: frontend

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: backend-api-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: backend-api
    version: v1
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend-api
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: backend-api
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPU: "200m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemory: "256Mi"
        sidecar.istio.io/interceptionMode: "REDIRECT"
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/excludeInboundPorts: "9090"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: backend-api
        image: backend-api:v1
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
          name: http
        - containerPort: 9090
          name: metrics
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "512Mi"
            cpu: "500m"
          limits:
            memory: "1Gi"
            cpu: "1000m"

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: backend-api-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: backend-api
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
  - port: 8080
    targetPort: 8080
    name: http
  - port: 9090
    targetPort: 9090
    name: metrics
  selector:
    app: backend-api

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: auth-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: auth
    version: v1
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: auth
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: auth
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPU: "150m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemory: "128Mi"
        sidecar.istio.io/logLevel: "warning"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: auth
        image: auth-service:v1
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
          name: http
        env:
        - name: JWT_SECRET
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              name: auth-secrets
              key: jwt-secret
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "256Mi"
            cpu: "250m"
          limits:
            memory: "512Mi"
            cpu: "500m"

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: auth-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: auth
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
  - port: 8080
    targetPort: 8080
    name: http
  selector:
    app: auth

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: database-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: database
    version: v1
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: database
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: database
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPU: "200m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemory: "256Mi"
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/includeInboundPorts: "5432"
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/excludeOutboundPorts: "3306"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: database
        image: database-service:v1
        ports:
        - containerPort: 5432
          name: postgresql
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "1Gi"
            cpu: "500m"
          limits:
            memory: "2Gi"
            cpu: "1000m"

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: database-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: database
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
  - port: 5432
    targetPort: 5432
    name: postgresql
  selector:
    app: database

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: messaging-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: messaging
    version: v1
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: messaging
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: messaging
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPU: "100m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemory: "128Mi"
        sidecar.istio.io/componentLogLevel: "misc:error"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: messaging
        image: messaging-service:v1
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
          name: http
        - containerPort: 5672
          name: amqp
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "512Mi"
            cpu: "250m"
          limits:
            memory: "1Gi"
            cpu: "500m"

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: messaging-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: messaging
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
  - port: 8080
    targetPort: 8080
    name: http
  - port: 5672
    targetPort: 5672
    name: amqp
  selector:
    app: messaging

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: cache-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: cache
    version: v1
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: cache
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: cache
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPU: "100m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemory: "128Mi"
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/includeInboundPorts: "6379"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: cache
        image: redis:7-alpine
        ports:
        - containerPort: 6379
          name: redis
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "256Mi"
            cpu: "100m"
          limits:
            memory: "512Mi"
            cpu: "200m"

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: cache-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: cache
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
  - port: 6379
    targetPort: 6379
    name: redis
  selector:
    app: cache

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: logging-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: logging
    version: v1
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: logging
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: logging
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: logging
        image: logging-service:v1
        ports:
        - containerPort: 9200
          name: http
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "1Gi"
            cpu: "500m"
          limits:
            memory: "2Gi"
            cpu: "1000m"

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: logging-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: logging
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
  - port: 9200
    targetPort: 9200
    name: http
  selector:
    app: logging

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: monitoring-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: monitoring
    version: v1
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: monitoring
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: monitoring
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: monitoring
        image: prometheus:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 9090
          name: http
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "512Mi"
            cpu: "250m"
          limits:
            memory: "1Gi"
            cpu: "500m"

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: monitoring-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: monitoring
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
  - port: 9090
    targetPort: 9090
    name: http
  selector:
    app: monitoring

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: notification-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: notification
    version: v1
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: notification
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: notification
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPU: "100m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemory: "128Mi"
        sidecar.istio.io/rewriteAppHTTPProbers: "true"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: notification
        image: notification-service:v1
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
          name: http
        livenessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /health
            port: 8080
          initialDelaySeconds: 30
          periodSeconds: 10
        readinessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /ready
            port: 8080
          initialDelaySeconds: 10
          periodSeconds: 5
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "256Mi"
            cpu: "250m"
          limits:
            memory: "512Mi"
            cpu: "500m"

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: notification-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: notification
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
  - port: 8080
    targetPort: 8080
    name: http
  selector:
    app: notification

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: payment-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: payment
    version: v1
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payment
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: payment
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPU: "200m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemory: "256Mi"
        sidecar.istio.io/statsInclusionPrefixes: "cluster.outbound,cluster_manager,listener_manager,http_mixer_filter,tcp_mixer_filter,server,cluster.xds-grpc"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: payment
        image: payment-service:v1
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
          name: http
        env:
        - name: STRIPE_API_KEY
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              name: payment-secrets
              key: stripe-api-key
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "512Mi"
            cpu: "500m"
          limits:
            memory: "1Gi"
            cpu: "1000m"

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: payment-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: payment
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
  - port: 8080
    targetPort: 8080
    name: http
  selector:
    app: payment

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: analytics-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: analytics
    version: v1
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: analytics
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: analytics
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPU: "150m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemory: "128Mi"
        proxy.istio.io/config: |
          concurrency: 2
          tracing:
            zipkin:
              address: zipkin.istio-system:9411
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: analytics
        image: analytics-service:v1
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
          name: http
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "512Mi"
            cpu: "250m"
          limits:
            memory: "1Gi"
            cpu: "500m"

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: analytics-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: analytics
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
  - port: 8080
    targetPort: 8080
    name: http
  selector:
    app: analytics
